name: 讀心術揭穿綠茶真面目
name_en: Mind-Reading Exposes Green Tea's True Colors
description: 女主用讀心術提前預言童黛會說'我不是故意來插足的'，當童黛真的說出這句話時，婆婆的三觀被徹底顛覆，從想換媳婦變成緊抱女主大腿。觀眾享受的是'全知視角碾壓'的智商優越感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Namja, here it comes. Here it comes. She's about to say I didn't mean to come between you two... Nanja, I didn't mean to come between you and Wine... Her inner thoughts are real. Oh no. Mom, you can't get a divorce. This is clearly the Rome family's living ancestor.
